text_excerpt: News | Priti Patel Skip to main content Priti Patel MP for Witham Main navigation Home About Priti Local News Campaigns In Parliament Contact Priti Patel MP for Witham News Priti Patel MP Visits Honywood School To Discuss The School's Plans For The Future Wednesday, 29 April, 2026 Priti Patel, Member of Parliament for Witham, recently visited Honywood School to meet Headteacher Mr Saunders and see first-hand the work being done to support pupils’ learning and development. The visit provided an opportunity to celebrate the school’s recent successes, including its student production of Grease , and to discuss wider upcoming projects. With the GCSE examination period...
